name: Chicken, Sweet and Sour
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Dark brown sugar; packed firmly
recipeInstructions:
Crockpot:
1. Put vegetables in the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place chicken atop the veggies.
4. Combine all other ingredients except rice in a small bowl.
5. Pour mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover the crockpot and turn to low, cook for 8-10 hours.
7. Before serving, make hot cooked rice.
8. Serve over rice. Leftovers can be reheated in microwave.
Oven:
1. Put vegetables in the bottom of a greased pan.
2. Sprinkle veggies with tapioca.
3. Add chicken to the pan.
4. Combine all other ingredients except rice in a small bowl.
5. Pour mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover pan tightly with foil.
7. Bake at 300°F oven for 2 hours.
8. Serve over rice. Leftovers can be reheated in microwave.
